xerotigana-of-crete-argiro.name: Xerotigana Of Crete

ingredients.item: Durum flour as it lifts about 4 fl.
A little extra flour for opening a leaf
Durum flour as it lifts about 4 fl.
A little extra flour for opening a leaf

instructions: In a bowl, add all the liquid ingredients and mix.
Gradually, stirring first with a spoon, add the flour until dough is formed.
Then with your hands, knead with flour until the bowl is completely cleaned from the rest of the dough.
The dough must be stable without sticking to the hands.
Place it in a bowl and cover and let it rest for at least 30 minutes.
Cut pieces of dough and ideally spread thin leaf by adding flour to the pasta machine.
Start with thick leaf and gradually reduce the thickness by sprinkle with flour.
When very thin, cut the leaf into thin strips with a leaf peach to make lace finishes.
Heat a lot of olive oil in a shallow pot in moderate intensity. The strong fire will give them dark color and bitter taste.
His wrapping process, shaped like a rose, is a little complicated and requires experience. With the help of a fork, wrap the dough and dip in the hot oil by turning quickly on a roll around the fork.
Alternatively you can give simple shape by hand.
Fry little until the dough is puffed and slightly blonded.
A few of them are fried and put on absorbent paper to drain.
Fast frying in moderate intensity makes them very crispy and blond in color.
After frying them all, let them cool completely and dry.
Then we add them by pouring them with the cold dense honey syrup.
Mix all the ingredients sesame cinnamon nuts and sprinkle the Cretan dry fry of the wedding.
